edgeCases: Empty/docs-only repo yields a valid empty inventory (primaryLanguage "", manifests/graph empty), exit 0
go list failure / uncompilable Go / missing toolchain: go-packages graph recorded best-effort empty with a Note, rest still emits, exit 0
Malformed package.json: npm manifest detected-but-unparsable (no build/test/deps), scan continues, exit 0
Skip set (vendor/node_modules/.git/.workflow/dist/build) + gitignored paths excluded from counts and layout
Symlinked/unreadable files skipped without aborting; depth-bounded layout caps deep trees
Deterministic byte-identical re-run on unchanged repo; read-only (only the output JSON is written, no source mutated)
HARD ERRORS (non-zero exit, no partial artifact): un-writable output path; non-existent/unreadable analysis root
